hero-display.purpose: Hero headlines only. The signature tight tracking.

tagline.purpose: Sub-section taglines and nav category names.

body.purpose: Default paragraph. The brand reading pace at 17px.

shadows.name: product-shadow
shadows.purpose: The single shadow. Product imagery resting on a surface only.

motion.name: press-scale
motion.purpose: System-wide press/active state for all buttons.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The signature Apple-style pill CTA. Action Blue background, single accent color.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #0066cc; color: #ffffff; font-family: "SF Pro Text", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -0.374px; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 11px 22px; min-height: 44px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0071e3; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0071e3; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Pill Button
components.description: Ghost pill variant. Transparent with Action Blue text and border. Paired with primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: transparent; color: #0066cc; font-family: "SF Pro Text", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.0; letter-spacing: -0.374px; border: 1px solid #0066cc; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 11px 22px; min-height: 44px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(0, 102, 204, 0.06); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0071e3; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Dark Utility Button
components.description: Compact utility button for nav actions. Near-black fill with white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-utility { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: #1d1d1f; color: #ffffff; font-family: "SF Pro Text", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.29; letter-spacing: -0.224px; border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 15px; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-utility:hover { opacity: 0.85; } .ds-btn-utility:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-utility:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0071e3; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Pill-shaped search input matching the CTA grammar.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { position: relative; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; } .ds-input-icon { position: absolute; left: 16px; color: #7a7a7a; pointer-events: none; } .ds-input-search { background: #ffffff; color: #1d1d1f; font-family: "SF Pro Text", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.47; letter-spacing: -0.374px; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 12px 20px 12px 40px; height: 44px; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s; } .ds-input-search::placeholder { color: #7a7a7a; } .ds-input-search:focus { border-color: #0066cc; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(0, 102, 204, 0.15); }

components.name: Utility Card
components.description: Standard content card with hairline border and large radius. No shadow.
components.html:
茅台

￥1,800.00

查看详情
components.css: .ds-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 18px; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-image { border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-image img { display: block; width: 100%; height: auto; } .ds-card-body { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: "SF Pro Text", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.24; letter-spacing: -0.374px; color: #1d1d1f; margin: 0; } .ds-card-price { font-family: "SF Pro Text", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.47; letter-spacing: -0.374px; color: #1d1d1f; margin: 0; } .ds-card-link { font-family: "SF Pro Text", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 400; color: #0066cc; text-decoration: none; } .ds-card-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Global top navigation. Pure black background, minimal height, fine-print text.
components.html:
Market
提醒 设置
components.css: .ds-nav { background: #000000; height: 44px; display: flex; align-items: center; } .ds-nav-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; width: 100%; max-width: 1440px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; } .ds-nav-brand { color: #ffffff; font-family: "SF Pro Text", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.12px; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 20px; } .ds-nav-link { color: #ffffff; font-family: "SF Pro Text", system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: -0.12px; text-decoration: none; opacity: 0.8; } .ds-nav-link:hover { opacity: 1; }

narrative.overview: Market is a precision instrument disguised as an Apple product page. The design borrows Apple's reverence for whitespace, typographic discipline, and the single-accent grammar, then bends them toward a financial tool's seriousness. The result is neither a cold trading terminal nor a warm lifestyle app. It is a calm workshop: well-lit, organized, where every tool is exactly where you need it and nothing shouts for attention.
keyCharacteristics: One accent color (Action Blue #0066cc) carries every interactive element.
Parchment (#f5f5f7) as the default canvas, not pure white.
SF Pro Display at 600 weight with negative letter-spacing for all display headlines.
Body copy at 17px, not 16px. The extra pixel sets a reading pace.
Full-pill radius reserved for primary actions only.
Zero shadows on UI chrome. Elevation from surface-color change.
Chinese text for all product-facing copy.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Action Blue is the only saturated color on any surface. Its presence signals interactivity. If a second accent color is introduced, the system loses its singular voice.

rules.name: The 17px Body Rule
rules.body: Body copy runs at 17px, not 16px. The extra pixel sets a reading pace that says 'consider this carefully.' Never reduce to 16px.

rules.name: The No-500 Rule
rules.body: The weight ladder is 300 / 400 / 600. Weight 500 is forbidden. Mid-weight emphasis always uses 600.

rules.name: The One Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are reserved for product imagery only. If a shadow appears on a button, card, or text, it is a bug.

dos: Do use Action Blue (#0066cc) for every interactive element.
Do set headlines in SF Pro Display 600 with negative letter-spacing.
Do run body copy at 17px / 400 / 1.47 line-height.
Do use Parchment (#f5f5f7) as the default canvas.
Do apply transform: scale(0.95) as the press state on every button.
Do use full-pill radius (9999px) for primary actions.
Do write all product-facing text in Chinese.
donts: Don't introduce a second accent color.
Don't add shadows to cards, buttons, or text.
Don't set body copy at weight 500.
Don't use border-left/right greater than 1px as colored accent stripes.
Don't use background-clip: text with gradient backgrounds.
Don't create identical card grids repeated endlessly.
Don't let the interface resemble traditional broker apps (Tonghuashun, East Money).
Don't introduce social features, comment threads, or leaderboards.
Don't use Sky Link Blue (#2997ff) on light surfaces.
